privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic CSL citation style file named 'firm-standard-2025.csl' with the style ID 'http://www.zotero.org/styles/firm-standard-2025' and title 'Firm Standard 2025' at /home/ga/Documents/firm-standard-2025.csl. The style file is generated by the setup_task.sh script with hardcoded XML content and is not from a real public Zotero repository (the style ID URL returns 404). All metadata claims match the actual CSL file content and creation path.
